serial_cmd_init.message0: Initialization serial port command analysis port %1 baud rate %2
serial_cmd_init.tooltip: Initialize serial port command parsing and automatically handle non-blocking reading and parsing

serial_cmd_on_received.message0: When a complete serial port command is received
serial_cmd_on_received.tooltip: Event: Triggered when the serial port receives a complete command ending with a newline character

serial_cmd_get_cmd.tooltip: Returns the complete command string currently received

serial_cmd_get_param_int.message0: Parsing integer arguments from instructions index %1
serial_cmd_get_param_int.tooltip: Parse integer arguments by index from instructions (0-based)

serial_cmd_reply_ok.tooltip: Serial port outputs OK prefix and message

serial_cmd_reply_err.tooltip: Serial port output ERR prefix and error message
